items.title: Create a short link
items.desc: POST /api/links with a target URL → returns a slug. Web form mirrors the API. Auth is optional per-instance (open / api-key / OAuth).

items.title: Redirect by slug
items.desc: GET /:slug → HTTP 302 to the stored target. The hot path of the service: cheap, cacheable, no auth, no DB write.

items.title: Custom slugs + auto-generation
items.desc: User can specify the slug ("black-friday-2026") or let the server generate a short base62 ID. Custom slugs collide-check; auto slugs are 6-8 chars.

items.title: Link expiry (optional)
items.desc: Per-link TTL: "expires in 30 days" or "after 1000 clicks". A nightly job sweeps expired links. Expired slugs return HTTP 410 Gone.

items.title: Per-link analytics (no PII)
items.desc: Per-slug dashboard: total clicks, referrers, rough geo (country only), user agent buckets. IPs are hashed; no cookies; no individual user records — only aggregates.
